NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: Overall schizophrenia symptom change (PANSS total or BPRS equivalent) at 4-8 weeks — standardised mean difference (SMD)
NMA_CONFIG.note: k=8 Pbo-anchored trials (representative, one-per-drug). SMD scale; Pbo-star network. Effect magnitudes match Leucht 2013 Lancet NMA values. For full 212-trial network see Leucht 2013.

title: RapidMeta Psychiatry | Antipsychotic Pivotal-Trial Summary NMA in Acute Schizophrenia v1.0
